SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.omf

Class OmfUtils

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.omf.OmfUtils
public final class OmfUtils extends Object
Utility methods for OMF parsing and writing.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    OmfUtils.PubdefContextData
    One grouped PUBDEF context with all symbols emitted for that context.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    MAX_INDEX_VALUE
    Maximum index representable by OMF 1/2-byte index encoding.
    static final int
    MAX_RECORD_CONTENT_LENGTH
    Maximum value representable by the 16-bit OMF Record Length field.
    static final int
    MAX_RECORD_DATA_LENGTH
    Maximum record data length (record contents minus checksum byte).

    emitChunkedRecords(OmfFile file, List<T> items, int maxRecordSize, String itemKind, Function<List<T>,OmfRecord> recordFactory)
    Emits a chunked sequence of plain records where each output record must fit under the provided maximum size.

    encodedIndexLength(int index)
    Returns the encoded byte length for an OMF index value.

    externalSymbolNames(OmfFile file)
    Flattens all EXTDEF symbol names from an OMF file in record order.

    Finds a segment definition by segment name.

    Returns a GRPDEF record by 1-based index.

    Returns a SEGDEF record by 1-based index.

    Groups all PUBDEF symbols by (group, segment, baseFrame) context in record order.

    Read a variable-length index from a byte array.

    Read a variable-length index from a stream.

    Read an unsigned 16-bit little-endian integer from a byte array.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_RECORD_CONTENT_LENGTH

      public static final int MAX_RECORD_CONTENT_LENGTH
      Maximum value representable by the 16-bit OMF Record Length field.

      Maximum record data length (record contents minus checksum byte).

      public static final int MAX_INDEX_VALUE
      Maximum index representable by OMF 1/2-byte index encoding.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • readIndex

      public static int readIndex(byte[] data, int[] offset)
      Read a variable-length index from a byte array. Indexes can be 1 or 2 bytes depending on the value.
      Parameters:
      data - the byte array to read from
      offset - array containing current offset (will be updated)
      Returns:
      the index value

    • readIndex

      public static int readIndex(ByteInputStream bis) throws IOException
      Read a variable-length index from a stream. Indexes can be 1 or 2 bytes depending on the value.
      Parameters:
      bis - the input stream
      Returns:
      the index value
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • writeIndex

      public static void writeIndex(ByteOutputStream bos, int index) throws IOException
      Write a variable-length index to a stream. Indexes can be 1 or 2 bytes depending on the value.
      Parameters:
      bos - the output stream
      index - the index value to write
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • u16le

      public static int u16le(byte[] data, int offset)
      Read an unsigned 16-bit little-endian integer from a byte array.
      Parameters:
      data - the byte array to read from
      offset - the offset to read at
      Returns:
      the integer value

    • u32le

      public static long u32le(byte[] data, int offset)
      Read an unsigned 32-bit little-endian integer from a byte array.
      Parameters:
      data - the byte array to read from
      offset - the offset to read at
      Returns:
      the integer value as a long

    • encodedIndexLength

      public static int encodedIndexLength(int index)
      Returns the encoded byte length for an OMF index value.
      Parameters:
      index - the index value
      Returns:
      encoded length in bytes

    • emitChunkedRecords

      public static <T> void emitChunkedRecords(OmfFile file, List<T> items, int maxRecordSize, String itemKind, Function<List<T>,OmfRecord> recordFactory)
      Emits a chunked sequence of plain records where each output record must fit under the provided maximum size.
      Type Parameters:
      T - item type
      Parameters:
      file - destination OMF file
      items - ordered items to chunk
      maxRecordSize - maximum full record size in bytes
      itemKind - item kind used in diagnostics
      recordFactory - factory that builds an OMF record from the current item chunk

    • findSegmentByName

      public static OmfRecordSegdef findSegmentByName(OmfFile file, String segmentName)
      Finds a segment definition by segment name.
      Parameters:
      file - OMF file
      segmentName - target segment name
      Returns:
      matching segment definition
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if file or segmentName is null
      IllegalStateException - if no segment with the provided name exists

    • getSegmentByIndex

      public static OmfRecordSegdef getSegmentByIndex(OmfFile file, int index)
      Returns a SEGDEF record by 1-based index.

      This is a utility wrapper around OmfFile.getSegmentByIndex for callers that only depend on OmfUtils.

      Parameters:
      file - OMF file
      index - 1-based SEGDEF index
      Returns:
      matching SEGDEF
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if file is null
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is not a valid SEGDEF index

    • getGroupByIndex

      public static OmfRecordGrpdef getGroupByIndex(OmfFile file, int index)
      Returns a GRPDEF record by 1-based index.

      This is a utility wrapper around OmfFile.getGroupByIndex for callers that only depend on OmfUtils.

      Parameters:
      file - OMF file
      index - 1-based GRPDEF index
      Returns:
      matching GRPDEF
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if file is null
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is not a valid GRPDEF index

    • externalSymbolNames

      public static List<String> externalSymbolNames(OmfFile file)
      Flattens all EXTDEF symbol names from an OMF file in record order.
      Parameters:
      file - OMF file
      Returns:
      EXTDEF symbol names
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if file is null

    • pubdefContexts

      public static List<OmfUtils.PubdefContextData> pubdefContexts(OmfFile file)
      Groups all PUBDEF symbols by (group, segment, baseFrame) context in record order.
      Parameters:
      file - OMF file
      Returns:
      grouped PUBDEF contexts
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if file is null

    • resolveFixupTargetName

      public static String resolveFixupTargetName(OmfFile file, OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry entry)
      Resolves a non-threaded fixup target into a stable human-readable token.
      Parameters:
      file - OMF file used for SEGDEF/GRPDEF/EXTDEF lookup
      entry - fixup entry
      Returns:
      target token in the form E:name, S:name, G:name, or F:index
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if file or entry is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if target uses thread context or has no target datum
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if target datum indexes an out-of-range SEGDEF/GRPDEF/EXTDEF
